document.title: Q3 Platform Migration Plan
document.content:
This document outlines the phased migration of the billing platform to the new event-driven architecture.

Phase 1 covers read-path parity: every existing report must return identical totals when served from the new pipeline before we cut traffic over.

Phase 2 covers write-path migration: new invoices and credit memos are written to both systems during a two-week dual-write window, with automated reconciliation running hourly.

Phase 3 decommissions the legacy billing service once dual-write reconciliation has shown zero discrepancies for seven consecutive days.

Open questions: who owns the rollback runbook, and does finance need a read-only export during the cutover window?

comments.author: Priya Shah
comments.body: Can we confirm finance is fine with a read-only export instead of a full parallel run?

comments.author: Noah Kim
comments.body: I'll own the rollback runbook and link it here by Friday.

comments.author: Ari Bell
comments.body: Reconciliation job is passing in staging for the last 3 days.
